name: Peg Jenning's Whiskey-Flavored Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the crabmeat in milk and butter.
2. Make the cream sauce by cooking the butter and flour together for 2 minutes.
3. Whisk in the milk and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Bring to a boil and whisk until smooth.
5. Add the cream; stir in the crab meat when it begins to simmer.
6. At the boiling point, gently stir in the whiskey.
7. Serve hot in heated cups with a sprinkle of parsley.
